title: Bond It Spray Adhesive 12 Pack (500ml Each) – Heavy Duty Multi-Purpose Aerosol Glue for Carpet Tiles, Flooring, Foam, Vinyl, and Fabric – High Strength Contact Spray adhesive spray
features: Professional Multi-Purpose Adhesive - Powerful spray adhesive designed for carpet tiles, flooring, foam, vinyl, and fabric applications. Delivers reliable, high-strength bonding for a variety of materials.

Long-Lasting Performance - Formulated for durable adhesion, this heavy duty glue maintains bond strength on demanding surfaces such as wood, concrete, rubber, and plastics, ideal for both home and workshop use.

Easy and Controlled Application - Equipped with a variable discharge nozzle for precise control. The aerosol spray adhesive provides even coverage and minimizes waste during application on large or small areas.
Non-Chlorinated and DCM-Free - Safe and effective formula — non-chlorinated and DCM-free. Designed for consistent, clean adhesion in carpet adhesive spray and vinyl adhesive spray applications.

Versatile for Multiple Industries - Suitable for flooring, furniture, and automotive uses. Ideal for foam glue, vinyl adhesive, and fabric adhesive spray tasks requiring dependable, long-term bonding.
description: Achieve reliable and lasting results with the Bond It Spray Adhesive 12 Pack (500ml Each) – a professional-grade multi-purpose aerosol glue designed for carpet tiles, flooring, foam, vinyl, and fabric applications. This heavy duty spray adhesive provides exceptional bonding strength across various materials, including wood, concrete, stone, rubber, metals, plastics, paper, and cork, making it an essential tool for flooring installation, furniture assembly, repairs, and more. Formulated as a non-chlorinated, DCM-free adhesive, it ensures safe and efficient performance without compromising strength. Each can is fitted with a variable discharge nozzle that allows precise control over spray volume, helping to achieve smooth and uniform coverage on different surfaces. The result is clean, consistent adhesion ideal for both professional and DIY use. This contact spray adhesive delivers long-lasting performance for demanding bonding applications, including perimeter bonding of carpet tiles, attaching foam to various substrates, or securing vinyl and fabric materials in construction, furniture, and automotive projects. Its quick application and strong adhesion make it a practical choice for fast-paced environments where efficiency matters. Whether used for carpet adhesive spray, foam glue, or vinyl adhesive spray, the Bond It Aerosol Spray Adhesive maintains reliable results even under continuous use. Trusted by professionals for its consistent bonding quality, this adhesive is ideal for repair work, light assembly, and non-structural installations that require high adhesion without the use of chlorinated solvents. Experience Bond It’s quality engineering in every can — dependable, easy to apply, and formulated for performance on a wide range of surfaces.

specifications_table.Compatible Material: Fabric, Glass, Metal, Paper, Plastic, Stone, Wood
